title: Coin Acceptor + Solenoid Dispenser Vending Mechanism
design_question: How to reliably accept coins, accumulate credit, and dispense product in a vending machine?
selected_approach: CH-926 coin acceptor wired to MCU interrupt pin (pulse count). MCU accumulates credit; when credit ≥ item price, energises a 12 V solenoid (or DC motor auger) for 500 ms to release one product unit. Relay-driven by N-channel MOSFET.
rationale: Pulse-count coin acceptor is vendor-programmable for local currency denominations. Solenoid dispense is faster (< 200 ms) than auger motors; suitable for cups, cans, or water spouts.

alternatives.reason_rejected: No coin handling but requires payment gateway hardware.
No electricity needed but uncontrolled dispensing.

verification_notes: FACT: 'Coin Acceptor — Pulse-Count Authentication and Relay Dispense' confirms pulse protocol and solenoid control method.
supporting_fact_titles: Coin Acceptor — Pulse-Count Authentication and Relay Dispense
Solenoid Valve for Pneumatic and Fluid Control
